---
title: "Global Statistics Dashboard"
author: "Pema Wangchuk"
date: today
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/pemawangchuk
    logo: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, plotly, leaflet, DT,
  gapminder, scales, sf,
  rnaturalearth, rnaturalearthdata, countrycode
)

# Filtered snapshot and world map (shared across all pages)
gapminder_2007 <- gapminder %>% filter(year == 2007)
world          <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
```

# Indicator 1: Life Expectancy {.tabset}

## Overview

```{r lifeexp-valuebox-global}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Global Average Life Expectancy (2007)"

list(
  icon = "heart-pulse",
  color = "primary",
  value = paste0(round(mean(gapminder_2007$lifeExp, na.rm = TRUE), 1), " yrs")
)
```

```{r lifeexp-valuebox-highest}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Highest Life Expectancy (2007)"

highest <- gapminder_2007 %>% slice_max(lifeExp, n = 1)
list(
  icon = "arrow-up-circle",
  color = "success",
  value = paste0(highest$country, ": ", round(highest$lifeExp, 1), " yrs")
)
```

```{r lifeexp-valuebox-lowest}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Lowest Life Expectancy (2007)"

lowest <- gapminder_2007 %>% slice_min(lifeExp, n = 1)
list(
  icon = "arrow-down-circle",
  color = "danger",
  value = paste0(lowest$country, ": ", round(lowest$lifeExp, 1), " yrs")
)
```

## Charts {.tabset}

### Distribution by Continent

```{r lifeexp-boxplot}
p <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(continent, lifeExp, median), y = lifeExp,
             fill = continent, text = paste0("Country: ", country,
                                             "<br>Life Exp: ", round(lifeExp, 1)))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Life Expectancy by Continent (2007)",
       x = "Continent", y = "Life Expectancy (years)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
```

### Trend Over Time

```{r lifeexp-trend}
p2 <- gapminder %>%
  group_by(continent, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_lifeExp = mean(lifeExp), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = mean_lifeExp, color = continent,
             text = paste0("Continent: ", continent,
                           "<br>Year: ", year,
                           "<br>Avg Life Exp: ", round(mean_lifeExp, 1)))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Average Life Expectancy Over Time by Continent",
       x = "Year", y = "Average Life Expectancy (years)", color = "Continent") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p2, tooltip = "text")
```

## Map

```{r lifeexp-map}
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

world_data <- world %>%
  left_join(gapminder_2007, by = c("name_long" = "country")) %>%
  left_join(
    gapminder_2007 |>
      mutate(iso_a3 = countrycode::countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c")),
    by = c("iso_a3" = "iso_a3")
  )

# Simpler join via iso codes
gapminder_iso <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  mutate(iso_a3 = countrycode::countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c"))

world_lifeexp <- world |>
  left_join(gapminder_iso, by = "iso_a3")

pal <- colorNumeric("YlOrRd", domain = world_lifeexp$lifeExp, na.color = "#d0d0d0")

leaflet(world_lifeexp) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal(lifeExp),
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 0.5,
    label = ~paste0(name_long, ": ", round(lifeExp, 1), " yrs"),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = ~lifeExp,
            title = "Life Expectancy (yrs)", opacity = 0.8)
```

## Data Table

```{r lifeexp-table}
gapminder_2007 %>%
  select(Country = country, Continent = continent,
         `Life Expectancy` = lifeExp, Population = pop, `GDP per Capita` = gdpPercap) %>%
  mutate(
    `Life Expectancy` = round(`Life Expectancy`, 1),
    Population = comma(Population),
    `GDP per Capita` = dollar(`GDP per Capita`, accuracy = 1)
  ) %>%
  datatable(
    filter = "top",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
    caption = "Life Expectancy and Economic Indicators by Country (2007)"
  )
```

# Indicator 2: GDP per Capita {.tabset}

## Overview

```{r gdp-valuebox-global}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Global Median GDP per Capita (2007)"

list(
  icon = "currency-dollar",
  color = "info",
  value = dollar(median(gapminder_2007$gdpPercap, na.rm = TRUE), accuracy = 1)
)
```

```{r gdp-valuebox-highest}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Highest GDP per Capita (2007)"

richest <- gapminder_2007 %>% slice_max(gdpPercap, n = 1)
list(
  icon = "bank",
  color = "success",
  value = paste0(richest$country, ": ", dollar(richest$gdpPercap, accuracy = 1))
)
```

```{r gdp-valuebox-lowest}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Lowest GDP per Capita (2007)"

poorest <- gapminder_2007 %>% slice_min(gdpPercap, n = 1)
list(
  icon = "exclamation-triangle",
  color = "warning",
  value = paste0(poorest$country, ": ", dollar(poorest$gdpPercap, accuracy = 1))
)
```

## Charts {.tabset}

### Top 20 Countries

```{r gdp-bar}
p3 <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  slice_max(gdpPercap, n = 20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(country, gdpPercap), y = gdpPercap,
             fill = continent,
             text = paste0("Country: ", country,
                           "<br>GDP per Capita: ", dollar(gdpPercap, accuracy = 1),
                           "<br>Continent: ", continent))) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Top 20 Countries by GDP per Capita (2007)",
       x = NULL, y = "GDP per Capita (USD)", fill = "Continent") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p3, tooltip = "text")
```

### Growth Over Time

```{r gdp-trend}
p4 <- gapminder %>%
  group_by(continent, year) %>%
  summarise(median_gdp = median(gdpPercap), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = median_gdp, color = continent,
             text = paste0("Continent: ", continent,
                           "<br>Year: ", year,
                           "<br>Median GDP: ", dollar(median_gdp, accuracy = 1)))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Median GDP per Capita Over Time by Continent",
       x = "Year", y = "Median GDP per Capita (USD)", color = "Continent") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p4, tooltip = "text")
```

## Map

```{r gdp-map}
gapminder_iso_gdp <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  mutate(iso_a3 = countrycode::countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c"))

world_gdp <- world %>%
  left_join(gapminder_iso_gdp, by = "iso_a3")

pal_gdp <- colorNumeric("Blues", domain = log10(world_gdp$gdpPercap + 1), na.color = "#d0d0d0")

leaflet(world_gdp) %>%
  addTiles() |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal_gdp(log10(gdpPercap + 1)),
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 0.5,
    label = ~paste0(name_long, ": ", dollar(gdpPercap, accuracy = 1)),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(weight = 2, color = "#333", bringToFront = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal_gdp, values = ~log10(gdpPercap + 1),
            title = "GDP per Capita (log scale)", opacity = 0.8)
```

## Data Table

```{r gdp-table}
gapminder_2007 %>%
  arrange(desc(gdpPercap)) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  select(Rank = rank, Country = country, Continent = continent,
         `GDP per Capita` = gdpPercap, Population = pop) |>
  mutate(
    `GDP per Capita` = dollar(`GDP per Capita`, accuracy = 1),
    Population = comma(Population)
  ) %>%
  datatable(
    filter = "top",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
    caption = "GDP per Capita Rankings by Country (2007)"
  )
```

# Relationship: Life Expectancy & GDP {.tabset}

## Overview

```{r rel-valuebox-correlation}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Correlation (Life Exp vs log GDP)"

r <- cor(gapminder_2007$lifeExp, log(gapminder_2007$gdpPercap))
list(
  icon = "graph-up",
  color = "primary",
  value = paste0("r = ", round(r, 3))
)
```

```{r rel-valuebox-countries}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Countries Analysed"

list(
  icon = "globe",
  color = "info",
  value = nrow(gapminder_2007)
)
```

```{r rel-valuebox-continents}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Continents"

list(
  icon = "map",
  color = "secondary",
  value = n_distinct(gapminder_2007$continent)
)
```

## Bubble Chart

```{r bubble-chart}
p5 <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y = lifeExp,
             size = pop, color = continent,
             text = paste0("Country: ", country,
                           "<br>GDP per Capita: ", dollar(gdpPercap, accuracy = 1),
                           "<br>Life Expectancy: ", round(lifeExp, 1), " yrs",
                           "<br>Population: ", comma(pop),
                           "<br>Continent: ", continent))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = dollar) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 20), labels = comma, name = "Population") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2", name = "Continent") +
  labs(title = "Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita (2007)",
       subtitle = "Bubble size represents population; x-axis on log scale",
       x = "GDP per Capita (USD, log scale)",
       y = "Life Expectancy (years)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p5, tooltip = "text")
```

## Animated Trend (1952–2007)

```{r animated-bubble}
p6 <- gapminder %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y = lifeExp,
             size = pop, color = continent,
             frame = year,
             text = paste0("Country: ", country,
                           "<br>GDP: ", dollar(gdpPercap, accuracy = 1),
                           "<br>Life Exp: ", round(lifeExp, 1)))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = dollar) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 18), labels = comma) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita Over Time",
       x = "GDP per Capita (USD, log scale)",
       y = "Life Expectancy (years)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p6, tooltip = "text") %>%
  animation_opts(frame = 600, easing = "linear", redraw = FALSE) |>
  animation_slider(currentvalue = list(prefix = "Year: "))
```

## By Continent

```{r facet-continent}
p7 <- gapminder_2007 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gdpPercap, y = lifeExp, color = continent,
             text = paste0(country, "<br>GDP: ", dollar(gdpPercap, accuracy = 1),
                           "<br>Life Exp: ", round(lifeExp, 1)))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = dollar) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  facet_wrap(~continent, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(title = "Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita by Continent (2007)",
       x = "GDP per Capita (log scale)", y = "Life Expectancy (years)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplotly(p7, tooltip = "text")
```
